name: S'more Sandwich Cookies
recipeIngredient: Pkg Pillsbury Refrigerated Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake 32 cookies as directed on package. Cool for 2 minutes or until completely cooled.
2. In a medium bowl, combine half cup powdered sugar and marshmallow creme; mix until well blended.
3. On a surface sprinkled with powdered sugar, knead in the remaining 1 1/2 cups powdered sugar. Shape mixture into two 8 inch ropes. Cut ropes into 2-inch pieces. Place one piece between two cookies; gently press together. Repeat with remaining marshmallow mixture.
16 cookies
